top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(bond_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
    AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) subquery;

SELECT AVG(single_bond_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, 
           COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END) AS single_bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'C'  -- Assuming carcinogenic molecules contain carbon atoms
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) subquery;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
    AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) subquery;

SELECT AVG(single_bond_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, 
           COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END) AS single_bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'C'  -- Assuming carcinogenic molecules contain carbon atoms
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) subquery;

SELECT AVG(single_bond_ratio) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id,
           CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(b.bond_id) AS single_bond_ratio
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'C'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) subquery;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
    AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) subquery;

SELECT AVG(single_bond_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, 
           COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END) AS single_bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'C'  -- Assuming carcinogenic molecules contain carbon atoms
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) subquery;

SELECT AVG(single_bond_ratio) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id,
           CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'single' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(b.bond_id) AS single_bond_ratio
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'C'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) subquery;

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(bond_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
    AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) subquery;
